sources.title: Her Secret Admirer Is A Killer | Blood Pressure | Drama Thriller
sources.description:
Her Secret Admirer Is A Killer | Blood Pressure | Drama Thriller

A woman, quietly harboring frustration, finds her life taking a perilous turn when an anonymous admirer starts dispatching letters, extravagant gifts, and increasingly bizarre directives. What initially ignites excitement rapidly transforms into a suspenseful ordeal as she grapples with obsession, fear, and the rising dangers of a love that has turned lethal.

Featuring Michelle Giroux, Judah Katz, and Jonas Chernick, Blood Pressure presents a captivating drama thriller brimming with tension, psychological suspense, and unforeseen twists that ensure viewers remain on the edge of their seats.

2012.  Stars: Michelle Giroux, Judah Katz, Jonas Chernick

metadata.Plot: In Toronto, Nicole is feeling depressed with her pharmacist job with an overbearing boss and her family life is a mess. In that gloom, Nicole starts receiving letters from a secret admirer bearing sympathy, gifts and instructions if she still wants the correspondence. Intrigued, she follows the directions and they invigorate her even as the letters become more bizarre. Eventually, Nicole figures out her admirer's identity and things take a disturbing turn with a difficult plea. Now, Nicole must decide how willing is she to fulfill it and whether there is more to this situation than it appears.
metadata.Writer: Jonas Chernick, Bill Fugler, Sean Garrity
metadata.Actors: Michelle Giroux, Judah Katz, Jonas Chernick
